description_long: This object is a small potted plant with broad, flat, matte green leaves radiating outward from a central cluster of short stems. The leaves are simple, oval to slightly elongated in shape, and have smooth edges with a subtle midrib visible on each. The plant appears to be low to the ground, with the foliage spreading horizontally rather than vertically. The stems are short and converge at the base, which is not clearly visible but suggests a compact root system. There is no visible pot or container, and the plant is depicted without any decorative elements or soil details. The overall appearance is clean and stylized, with a uniform green color and no visible imperfections or markings.
description: A small, stylized potted plant with broad, smooth green leaves radiating from short central stems. The foliage is simple, matte, and evenly colored.
description_view_0: Three large, flat green leaves are visible, with one leaf in the foreground and two extending to the sides.
description_view_1: The central round leaf is most prominent, flanked by two side leaves, giving a symmetrical appearance.
description_view_2: Four leaves are visible, with the central leaf partially obscured and the leaves spreading more horizontally.
description_view_3: The plant appears widest, with all leaves fanned out and the stems converging at the base.
